semanticCore: Escape, safety, salvation, whispering, or elevation
quranicRelevance: Salvation/escape from danger (Najat - 'naja'), private counsel/whispering (Najwa), and elevated ground.

keyDerivations.meaning: To escape, be saved, or survive
Private conversation, secret talk, or whisper
In private consultation, or speaking secretly

figurativeOrRareUsages: نَجْوَى: Secret counsel (literally 'elevated talk' or 'cut off conversation').
نَجِيًّا (19:52): Privately conversing or honored with proximity.
discardedNoise: The bark of a tree that is peeled.
summaryEn: The root encompasses salvation and private communication, linking physical rescue (Najat) with secret counsel/whispering (Najwa).
summaryAr: يشمل هذا الجذر النجاة والمحادثة السرية، رابطاً بين الخلاص المادي (النجاة) والمناجاة والحديث السري (نجوى).
rawText: أَنْجَاهُ 4 and 🡻نَجَّاهُ He saved, him; rescued him; preserved him. (K.) اِسْتَنْجَى 10 He washed, or wiped with a stone or a piece of dry clay, the place [of exit] of his excrement. (Msb.) ___ اِسْتَنْجَوْا: see 8 in art. سعر. مَنْجَاةٌ [A cause, or means, of safety: of the measure مَفْعَلَةٌ, originally مَنْجَوَةٌ; similar to مَفْلَحَةٌ, &c.]. (S.) نَجَا 1 Alvum dejecit; (Msb, TA;) ventumve per anum emisit: (TA:) he voided his ordure; or broke wind. === نَجَا, inf. n. نَجَآءٌ, He was quick, or swift, and outstripped. (S.) See an ex. of the inf. n., voce غولٌ. === نَجَا He became safe, or secure; he escaped. (Msb, &c.) نَجَيْتُ a dial. var. of نَجَوْتُ: see دَوْكَةٌ. نَجِىٌّ : see نَجْوَى. === عُرْيَانُ النَّجِىِّ: see art. عرى. نَجَّوَ 2 see 4. نَجْوٌ and نَجَآءٌ A shower of rain. === See شُوْبُوبٌ and 1. === نجاء A well of which the water is distant [from the mouth]. (O, TA, voce قَرَبٌ.) نَجْوَةٌ An elevated piece of land. (Msb.) نَجْوَى Secret discourse between two persons or parties. (TA.) === A secret between two persons or parties; as also 🡻نَجِىٌّ. (K, TA.) === A person, or persons, discoursing secretly, or telling secrets one with another. (TA.)
